response.justification: Bogdan has strong general software engineering experience and a broad technical background, including Java, but his recent roles have focused heavily on TypeScript, Node.js, and other non-JVM technologies. While he demonstrates a passion for tooling and developer experience, his lack of recent enterprise Java/Kotlin IDE tooling experience raises concerns about his immediate fit for this role. His open-source contributions and workshops show creativity and technical depth, but they don't directly align with JVM IDE development.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship with experience in TDD, CI/CD, and clean architecture
Proven ability to work on complex systems and optimize performance (e.g., micro-services, low-latency apps)
Active contributor to open-source projects and community workshops, showing passion for developer tooling
concerns: Limited recent experience with Java/Kotlin and JVM ecosystems (last Java role was in 2015-2018)
No direct experience with IDE internals, enterprise frameworks (Spring), or build tools (Gradle/Maven) as primary focus
Recent roles heavily skewed toward TypeScript/Node.js and AI/developer tooling, which may not translate directly to JVM IDE tooling
